steps.title: Identify the passage structure
steps.content: The passage describes two research directions on convergent evolution, notes what remains unknown between them, then explains what motivated Green and Extavour's work. The key signal is this contextualizing framework — it positions their study within a research landscape.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: C states the purpose is to situate Green and Extavour's study in the context of their field — which matches what the passage does: it frames their work within two prior research directions and identifies the gap that motivated them. The others either misread this as prescriptive advice or invent unwarranted claims about new problems and criticism. That matches choice C — C is correct.
